rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending endowment-effect/psychological-ownership research and studies WTA–WTP asymmetries, while the cited paper is directly about when losses loom larger than gains, endowment effects, and key moderators (emotional attachment, cognitive perspective). The citing studies also use BDM elicitation, which the cited commentary discusses as a methodological boundary issue, making this citation plausibly theory/mechanism-relevant rather than a generic mention.
